Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product listings, promotions, and brake part details to supply fresh content for email generation.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every email reflects live inventory and active deals, keeping messaging accurate and conversion-ready without manual content gathering.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a complete daily marketing email — subject line, body copy, and CTAs — tailored to R1 Concepts brake parts using scraped product data.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Produces professional, on-brand email content daily with zero copywriting time, enabling consistent customer outreach at scale.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Receives the AI-generated email and sends it to the configured R1 Concepts contact lists via HubSpot Marketing Email API.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Delivers targeted daily emails to segmented audiences automatically, driving repeat purchases and brand engagement without manual campaign setup.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes Dynamic Friction Company product pages, featured parts, and current offers to inform AI email generation.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Keeps email content aligned with DFC's live catalog and promotions, reducing errors and eliminating manual content briefing.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Writes a daily marketing email for Dynamic Friction Company, crafting subject lines, body copy, and CTAs based on scraped site content.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Maintains a daily email cadence for DFC with zero manual writing effort, supporting dealer and customer engagement consistently.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Sends the AI-drafted DFC marketing email to the appropriate HubSpot contact lists via the Marketing Email API.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Automates full-cycle email delivery for DFC, ensuring audiences receive fresh product communications daily without team intervention.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls newly created or updated support tickets from HubSpot, including customer messages, ticket category, and contact history.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Centralizes incoming support requests for AI processing, ensuring no ticket is missed and response workflows begin immediately.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies each ticket by issue type and drafts a contextual, brand-appropriate reply for the R1 Concepts support team to review and send.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Cuts ticket triage and response drafting time dramatically, allowing support agents to handle higher volume with consistent quality.

R1 Support Agent.action: Writes the AI-generated classification and draft reply back to the HubSpot ticket for agent review and one-click sending.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Keeps all support activity inside HubSpot, giving agents a streamlined review workflow without switching tools or copying content.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls all form submissions from the Amazon in-box flyer return and issue forms stored in HubSpot, including customer details and issue descriptions.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Aggregates dispersed customer issue reports into a single structured pull, making data immediately available for analysis without manual export.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs the retrieved HubSpot form submissions into a structured Google Sheet, appending new records and organizing data by issue category.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Gives operations and product teams a live, sortable view of customer issues to identify trends, prioritize fixes, and reduce return rates.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot contact activity to detect when DFC customers visit or engage with the R1 Concepts website, capturing behavioral signals in real time.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Surfaces high-intent buying signals instantly, giving the sales team a precise window to reach out while customer interest is at its peak.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Sends a real-time alert to the DFC sales team via Microsoft Teams message and email, including the contact's name, activity details, and a HubSpot link.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Eliminates manual CRM monitoring and ensures sales reps act on warm leads within minutes, increasing outreach speed and deal conversion likelihood.

R1 Customer Agent.action: This agent is currently in development and connections have not yet been defined.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Once live, this agent will serve as a customer-facing AI interface for R1 Concepts, improving self-service resolution and reducing support load.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Scrapes local business directories and listings to identify businesses in the Cerritos area that may need warehouse or office space.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Generates a fresh pool of qualified local leads daily without manual prospecting, dramatically accelerating the sublet outreach pipeline.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Finds and validates contact email addresses for each discovered business to enable direct outreach.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Ensures outreach reaches real decision-makers, increasing email deliverability and response rates for the sublet campaign.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Logs enriched leads into HubSpot and triggers a warm intro email about the 13140 Midway Place Cerritos sublet opportunity.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Automates the full prospecting-to-outreach cycle daily, filling the sublet pipeline with warm contacts and tracking all engagement in one place.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Pulls campaign performance data across R1 and DFC Amazon ad accounts, including spend, impressions, clicks, and ACOS metrics.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Consolidates cross-brand ad performance into a single data feed, enabling unified analysis that would take hours to compile manually.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Analyzes campaign performance data to identify underperforming ads, budget inefficiencies, and optimization opportunities across both brands.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Delivers actionable ad optimization recommendations at scale, helping reduce wasted spend and improve return on ad investment across R1 and DFC.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches YouTube using input keywords to find relevant content creators, retrieving channel metadata, subscriber counts, and recent video performance.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Surfaces a broad pool of keyword-matched creators instantly, replacing hours of manual YouTube browsing with structured, scalable discovery.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Retrieves Instagram profile data for discovered creators, including follower counts, post frequency, and engagement metrics.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Extends creator discovery cross-platform, ensuring brands find creators with strong multi-channel presence and maximized audience reach.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes aggregated creator data from all sources to assess relevance, audience fit, and content quality against the input keyword criteria.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Filters a large raw creator pool down to genuinely relevant candidates, saving hours of manual vetting and improving partnership quality.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores each discovered creator using customizable weighting criteria — such as engagement rate, niche relevance, audience size, and posting consistency.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Produces a ranked, objective shortlist of best-fit creators for outreach, removing guesswork from influencer selection and accelerating partnership decisions.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves pre-built outreach sequences, prompt templates, and qualified creator lists stored in Drive folders.
Creator Outreach.impact: Centralizes all outreach assets so the agent always uses the latest approved messaging and targeting criteria without manual file hunting.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach emails for each creator by applying learned sequences and prompts to their profile data.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces tailored, on-brand outreach at scale, replacing hours of manual copywriting and increasing reply rates through personalization.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails directly to each qualified creator from the brand email account.
Creator Outreach.impact: Automates high-volume creator outreach delivery, ensuring consistent follow-up cadence without any manual sending effort.

Creator Reponse.action: Retrieves historical influencer email conversations and negotiation outcomes to learn context and successful deal patterns.
Creator Reponse.impact: Gives the AI grounded, brand-specific negotiation intelligence rather than generic responses, improving deal consistency.

Creator Reponse.action: Reads incoming creator replies from the Gmail inbox and passes the conversation thread to the AI for context-aware response generation.
Creator Reponse.impact: Eliminates manual inbox monitoring and ensures no creator reply goes unaddressed, accelerating negotiation cycles.

Creator Reponse.action: Analyzes the creator's reply alongside historical negotiation data to generate a contextually appropriate response that advances the deal.
Creator Reponse.impact: Handles negotiation conversations at scale with learned brand voice and deal strategy, reducing back-and-forth time per creator.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Matches MHM vehicle part numbers against the New Availability Guide to identify in-stock products eligible for the weekly promotion.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Eliminates manual cross-referencing of vehicle fitment data, cutting load sheet preparation from hours to seconds with zero lookup errors.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Posts a notification to the relevant Teams channel confirming the load sheet has been generated and the email campaign is being built.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Keeps the sales and marketing team informed of campaign readiness in real time without requiring anyone to check email or manually report status.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Creates and sends the Must Have Monday HubSpot email with the generated sales sheet and load sheet attached to the target contact list.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Fully automates weekly campaign deployment, ensuring consistent Monday delivery and freeing marketing staff from repetitive email build tasks.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates email copy for new product launch announcements and monthly recap emails using product data and brand messaging guidelines.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Produces launch-ready email content instantly, allowing DFC to get First to Market campaigns out faster than competitors with consistent quality.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Creates email drafts in HubSpot populated with AI-generated copy and attaches the relevant sales sheet for marketer review before sending.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Delivers ready-to-review campaign drafts directly in HubSpot, removing all manual email build work and reducing time-to-publish per launch.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls lifecycle stage metrics, contact growth, and campaign performance data from HubSpot for the reporting period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Aggregates CRM performance data in seconds, replacing manual report exports that previously took significant analyst time each month.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Fetches SMS campaign performance metrics including sends, CTR, and revenue attribution for the monthly period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Captures SMS channel ROI data automatically, ensuring the deck reflects full omnichannel performance without manual platform logins.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Retrieves web traffic, conversion, and session data from GA4 to populate site performance slides in the deck.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Delivers accurate web analytics directly into the deck, eliminating copy-paste errors from manual GA4 report exports.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Writes all collected metrics into slides 48–55 of the Marketing Highlights deck, updating charts, tables, and KPI callouts automatically.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Produces a fully updated 8-slide reporting section in minutes, saving hours of monthly deck formatting work and eliminating stale data risk.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Identifies keyword gaps where R1 Concepts underperforms versus competitors by analyzing impression and ranking data.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Surfaces high-opportunity keyword targets automatically, ensuring every blog produced addresses a real traffic gap rather than guesswork.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Writes full SEO-optimized blog articles targeting the identified keyword gaps using automotive product expertise and structured content briefs.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Generates publish-ready long-form content at scale, dramatically increasing content output velocity without expanding the writing team.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Publishes the AI-written blog post to the R1 Concepts WordPress site with Yoast SEO fields populated including title, meta, and focus keyword.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Completes end-to-end blog production and publishing without human involvement, compressing a multi-hour process into a fully automated pipeline.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Exports open purchase order data including vendor details, due dates, quantities, and outstanding balances from the Dream ERP system.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Captures the full vendor PO picture automatically from the source system, eliminating manual data pulls and ensuring accuracy at the start of the workflow.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Transforms and uploads the processed PO data into HubSpot contact and deal records to trigger automated vendor chase email sequences.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Turns raw ERP exports into actionable CRM records that drive timely vendor follow-up, reducing overdue POs and improving supply chain accountability.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Accepts MHM vehicle part number input and matches it against the embedded New Availability Guide data entirely within the browser.
DFC Load Sheet Generator.impact: Gives the sales team an instant, no-login tool to verify availability and build load sheets on demand without relying on back-end systems.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Exports the matched results as a formatted DFC load sheet Excel file ready for distribution or upload.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Launches a Chrome browser session and navigates to Attentive to locate and clone the most recent MHM SMS campaign.
MHM Attentive SMS Automation.impact: Replicates a proven campaign structure instantly, ensuring brand consistency and saving the manual effort of rebuilding the campaign from scratch each week.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Updates the cloned campaign with the current week's MHM vehicle name and adjusts the scheduled send time before saving.
MHM Attentive SMS Automation.impact: Completes the full weekly SMS campaign setup without any human interaction in the platform, ensuring on-time Monday sends every week.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Exports DFC sales transaction data including customer purchase history, order frequency, revenue, and product mix for the analysis period.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Provides a complete, accurate sales dataset as the foundation for all segmentation and campaign logic, replacing manual reporting exports.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Segments customers into cohorts such as reorder candidates, cross-sell targets, and win-back prospects based on purchase behavior analysis, then enrolls them in automated email sequences.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Activates targeted revenue recovery and growth campaigns automatically, turning raw sales data into personalized outreach that drives repeat purchases.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Sends segmented SMS campaigns to high-priority customer groups such as lapsed buyers or upsell candidates identified from the sales analysis.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Extends campaign reach to the SMS channel with precisely targeted messaging, increasing re-engagement rates beyond what email alone achieves.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors a designated Teams channel for a new Excel file uploaded by William Nguyen each week.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Eliminates manual file checking and ensures the automation triggers only when fresh session data is available, removing delays in email prep.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Uploads the new Excel file to HubSpot File Manager and generates a new public download URL.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Ensures every Saturday email points to the correct, up-to-date session file without manual link replacement or broken URLs.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Clones the previous Super Session Saturday email, swaps in the new download link, and schedules the send for 8AM Saturday.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Delivers a consistently branded weekly email on schedule with zero manual build time, keeping DFC session participants engaged and informed every week.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates SEO-optimized B2B blog content targeted at shops, distributors, and fleets based on keyword and topic inputs.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publication-ready blog drafts in minutes instead of hours, scaling DFC's content output without adding headcount.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Receives the AI-generated blog post and publishes or stages it with SEO metadata, tags, and categories applied.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Keeps DFC's blog consistently populated with indexed, search-ready content that attracts organic B2B traffic from target buyer segments.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Puppeteer scrapes YouTube for existing Friction Friday-style videos, Bing Images for vehicle visuals, and Wikipedia/Wikimedia for factual vehicle data to seed the content pipeline.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Research that would take a producer 30–60 minutes is completed in seconds, ensuring every video starts with accurate specs, real imagery, and competitive context.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Claude receives all scraped vehicle data and generates a structured Friction Friday video script — including hook, segment breakdowns, and call-to-action — matched to the show's tone and format.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: A broadcast-ready script is produced in under a minute, eliminating hours of copywriting and maintaining consistent brand voice across every episode.

Friction Friday Automation.action: ElevenLabs converts the Claude-written script into a natural-sounding voiceover audio file using a designated show voice.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Professional-quality narration is generated instantly, removing the need to book, direct, or edit a human voice actor for every episode.

Friction Friday Automation.action: An Apps Script webhook assembles all outputs — script, voiceover, thumbnail image, and video package — logs them to a tracking sheet, and triggers final delivery of the complete Friction Friday production bundle.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: The entire end-to-end video package is delivered in one place with zero manual handoffs, turning a multi-hour production process into a single automated run.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Pulls all active HubSpot workflows for R1 Concepts and audits enrollment triggers, logic branches, and email sequences for gaps or inefficiencies.
R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.impact: Identifies broken triggers and redundant steps that cause missed follow-ups or duplicate sends, improving lead conversion rates without rebuilding from scratch.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Applies optimized trigger conditions, re-sequences welcome series emails, and updates workflow settings based on audit findings.
R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.impact: Ensures every new lead and site visitor enters the correct nurture path automatically, increasing engagement and reducing manual workflow management.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Extracts customer records including Dream CustomerIDs, contact details, and account attributes from the Dream ERP system.
DFC HubSpot Data Setup.impact: Captures the authoritative source-of-truth customer data needed to accurately link ERP accounts to HubSpot contacts for sales automation.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.impact: Unlocks personalized, data-driven sales automation for DFC by connecting ERP transaction history to CRM contact profiles, enabling smarter segmentation and outreach.

Bomb File Project.action: Project is in planning stage — connections and workflow steps have not yet been defined.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Detects the latest R1 Concepts YouTube video and extracts the title, URL, description, and transcript for downstream use.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Publishes a blog post embedding the YouTube video with AI-written supporting content and SEO metadata applied.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Delivers a consistent branded touchpoint each week that drives traffic back to R1 content and product pages, supporting sales pipeline activity.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls weekly keyword rankings, impressions, clicks, and average position data for all DFC blog posts.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Provides clear visibility into which blog content is gaining search traction, enabling fast optimization decisions to improve rankings.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Retrieves weekly traffic, session, engagement, and conversion data attributed to DFC blog content.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Connects blog performance directly to business outcomes like sessions and goal completions, quantifying the ROI of the content program.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Retrieves post-level metadata including publish dates, word counts, categories, and Yoast SEO scores for all blog entries.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Ties content quality signals to traffic and ranking outcomes, helping the team understand what post attributes drive the best results.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls monthly keyword ranking, impression, and click data for all R1 Concepts blog content.
R1 Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Surfaces which R1 topics are winning in search and which need attention, enabling monthly strategy refinement backed by real data.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Retrieves monthly session, user, and engagement metrics attributed to the R1 blog to measure audience growth and content impact.
R1 Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Demonstrates month-over-month blog growth in concrete traffic and engagement terms, supporting continued investment in the content program.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls post publication history, content volume, and metadata to compile a monthly content output summary for the report.
R1 Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Gives stakeholders a clear picture of content production velocity alongside performance data to evaluate efficiency and editorial pacing.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Monitors the Outlook inbox for incoming vendor PO invoice PDF attachments and triggers the automation upon detection.
PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.impact: Eliminates the need to manually identify and route invoices, ensuring every qualifying PDF enters the processing queue immediately upon arrival.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Processes the PDF by programmatically applying the Harbor Tires stamp image and Richard's signature to the designated fields on each invoice.
PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.impact: Reduces invoice processing time from minutes of manual effort per document to seconds per file, with consistent placement every time.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Saves the stamped and signed PDF as a finalized document and prepares it for return delivery or filing.
PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.impact: Produces a professionally signed, audit-ready invoice document that meets vendor requirements without any manual handling of the file.

DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.action: Tracks which DFC prospect pages are being visited and passes behavioral signals to HubSpot for trigger mapping.
DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.impact: Captures real-time prospect intent data, ensuring email triggers are based on actual page engagement rather than guesswork.

DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.action: Fires one of 6 Phase 1 workflow triggers based on the specific prospect page visited and enrolls the contact into the matching email sequence.
DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.impact: Delivers contextually relevant outreach within minutes of a site visit, increasing conversion likelihood and reducing manual follow-up workload.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Receives incoming customer support tickets from R1 Concepts customers and queues them for AI classification.
R1 AI Ticketing Automation.impact: Centralizes all inbound support requests into a single processing pipeline, eliminating manual sorting and reducing response time.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Classifies the ticket by issue type, urgency, and recommended resolution path, then drafts an appropriate response or escalation.
R1 AI Ticketing Automation.impact: Resolves common tickets automatically and routes complex ones accurately, cutting average handle time and improving customer satisfaction scores.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Updates the ticket record with the AI classification, posts the drafted response or assigns to the correct agent queue.
R1 AI Ticketing Automation.impact: Ensures every ticket is actioned immediately with full context, reducing backlog and enabling support agents to focus on high-value cases.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Receives the monthly new arrivals file from Gerrit Young and initiates the upload process to the DFC backend.
DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).impact: Eliminates manual handoff delays by triggering the downstream automation the moment the file is shared, keeping launch timelines on schedule.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Ingests the new arrivals file and structures the product data to feed into both the HubSpot email and Attentive SMS templates.
DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).impact: Creates a single source of truth for product data, ensuring both email and SMS channels display consistent, accurate part information.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Clones the existing NAG email template, populates it with the new arrivals data, and schedules it for the monthly send.
DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).impact: Saves hours of manual email building each month while maintaining brand-consistent formatting across every new arrival announcement.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Clones the existing NAG SMS template, inserts the new arrivals content, and queues the message for the matched send window.
DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).impact: Extends new arrival announcements to the SMS audience simultaneously with email, maximizing reach without any additional manual effort.

Don Carrier Outreach.action: Identifies and enrolls prospective shipping carriers into an outreach sequence and automatically sends templated RFQ emails on behalf of the team.
Don Carrier Outreach.impact: Scales carrier prospecting without adding headcount, ensuring a consistent pipeline of new shipping options is always being evaluated.

Don Carrier Outreach.action: Evaluates carrier responses against qualification thresholds — cost within 5% of current carriers and lead time benchmarks — and auto-qualifies or disqualifies each prospect.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Pulls current week performance data from all three paid channels including spend, impressions, clicks, and conversions.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Compares current week metrics against the prior month's average and generates a plain-English performance summary with notable trends and anomalies.
Weekly Checkup Bot.impact: Transforms raw numbers into actionable insight instantly, giving the team a clear picture of what is working and what needs attention each week.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Sends the formatted weekly performance checkup report to the relevant team members every week automatically.
Weekly Checkup Bot.impact: Ensures the full team stays aligned on paid channel health with zero manual reporting effort, freeing up analyst time for strategic work.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Extracts full-month performance data across all paid channels to feed into the monthly report build.
Monthly Report Builder.impact: Aggregates a complete month of cross-platform data in one pull, replacing hours of manual data collection at end of month.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Structures and formats the monthly data into slide-ready narratives, performance summaries, and key takeaways aligned to the end-of-month presentation format.
Monthly Report Builder.impact: Produces a presentation-ready report draft in minutes instead of hours, letting the team focus on strategic discussion rather than slide formatting.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Delivers the completed monthly report to stakeholders with the formatted content ready to paste or review for the end-of-month slides.
Monthly Report Builder.impact: Gets the report into the right hands automatically before the meeting, ensuring stakeholders are prepared without last-minute scrambling.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Detects when a contact completes the Amazon flyer warranty registration and tags them for Meta audience export.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.impact: Maximizes match rates on Meta by ensuring clean, properly formatted data is passed through, improving audience size and ad targeting accuracy.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Adds the validated warranty registrants into the designated custom audience for retargeting and lookalike campaigns.
Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.impact: Automatically grows a high-converting audience of verified buyers, enabling ongoing retargeting and lookalike expansion without any manual audience management.

Paid Social Copy Audit.action: Pulls active ad creative data including copy, spend, CTR, and conversion metrics across both paid social platforms.
Paid Social Copy Audit.impact: Surfaces all active ad performance data in one pass, replacing manual platform-by-platform copy review that would take hours each week.

Paid Social Copy Audit.action: Analyzes underperforming ads against top performers and generates specific, actionable copy improvement recommendations for each flagged ad.
Paid Social Copy Audit.impact: Delivers expert-level copy analysis at scale, enabling the team to act on data-backed recommendations rather than subjective creative opinions.

Paid Social Copy Audit.action: Sends the audit report with flagged ads and copy recommendations to the paid social team for review and action.
Paid Social Copy Audit.impact: Puts prioritized, ready-to-act recommendations directly in the team's inbox, ensuring no underperforming ad goes unaddressed each cycle.

Asana Agent.action: Reads existing tasks, project statuses, and assignments across active Asana boards to provide Claude with full context.
Asana Agent.impact: Gives the AI a complete picture of current work in flight, enabling accurate and relevant responses without manual context-setting.

Asana Agent.action: Processes the Asana data to generate summaries, identify blockers, suggest next steps, or draft task updates based on the request.
Asana Agent.impact: Converts raw project data into clear, actionable outputs that save project managers time spent manually reviewing and synthesizing task boards.

Asana Agent.action: Delivers the AI-generated Asana summary, recommendations, or update drafts to the relevant team member via email.
Asana Agent.impact: Surfaces project intelligence directly in the inbox, keeping stakeholders informed and unblocked without requiring them to log into Asana.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Captures the transcript or notes from the weekly media meeting and passes the raw discussion content downstream for processing.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Routes the meeting content to Claude via email as the structured input for task extraction and formatting.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Parses the meeting notes to extract discrete tasks, owners, deadlines, and project context from the discussion.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Creates new tasks in the appropriate Asana projects with all extracted details including owner, deadline, and meeting context.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Ensures every commitment made in the media meeting is tracked and assigned in Asana automatically, keeping the team accountable without any manual entry.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Pulls performance data for all active search ads, isolating underperforming ads based on metrics like CTR, conversion rate, and Quality Score.
Google Ads Copy Audit.impact: The audit scope is instantly defined with real performance data, ensuring recommendations target the ads that are actually costing the business money.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Claude analyzes the underperforming ad copy, identifies weaknesses in messaging, relevance, and structure, and generates specific rewrite recommendations for each flagged ad.

Google Ads Copy Audit.impact: Decision-makers receive a clear, actionable brief without logging into Google Ads, accelerating review and approval cycles.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Reads the Agent Tracker sheet and extracts all agent records, status fields, connection data, and recent updates to pass into the formatting pipeline.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Raw tracker data is captured in full automatically, eliminating the manual effort of compiling a weekly status summary from a multi-tab spreadsheet.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Sends the formatted weekly agent tracker update to the intended recipients on a scheduled basis.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Mark submits a vehicle spec — make, model, year, and related details — through a HubSpot form, which triggers the downstream catalog workflow.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Dream is queried with the submitted vehicle spec to retrieve what DFC currently stocks for that application and identify any gaps in inventory coverage.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: A complete inventory picture for the requested vehicle is pulled in seconds, replacing what would otherwise require a manual catalog search or internal lookup request.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Claude formats the Dream inventory results into a structured, readable Excel-ready output — clearly separating stocked parts from missing inventory with appropriate labels and layout.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: The output is immediately usable without manual reformatting, saving Mark the time of organizing raw inventory data into a presentable catalog format.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Sends Mark the completed Excel catalog file as an email attachment, ready for use in special markets sales conversations.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Mark receives a finished, professional catalog within minutes of submitting the form, enabling faster and more informed customer-facing discussions.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Dream is queried for live inventory status on every part in the weekly backorder report, returning on-hand quantities, on-order records, and in-transit shipment data.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Real-time inventory enrichment is completed in one automated pass, replacing the hours spent by a dozen team members doing independent manual lookups each week.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: The backorder report is enriched with the live Dream data, with dead-end parts — those with no on-hand, on-order, or in-transit source — automatically flagged for escalation.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: The team gains an instantly prioritized view of the backorder situation, with problem parts surfaced automatically so no critical gap is buried in a spreadsheet.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Sends draft customer communications for flagged backorder items — pre-written with current status details — ready for review and send.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Customer-facing updates are drafted automatically, cutting the communication prep time from hours across multiple people to a single review-and-send step.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo's online catalogs to collect make, model, and year fitment data for all available two-piece rotor applications.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: A comprehensive competitive fitment reference is built automatically, replacing hours of manual catalog browsing across three separate vendor sites.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references scraped competitor fitment data against DFC's existing parts catalog and compiles the results into a formatted reference sheet for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gaps and overlaps between DFC's inventory and competitor offerings are visible in one structured sheet, enabling faster product and sourcing decisions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers to gather demand data on two-piece rotor applications not currently in DFC's catalog.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Demand signal collection runs in parallel with catalog building, giving Dino real customer data to justify sourcing decisions before committing to inventory.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active Meta and TikTok ad copy across campaigns and ad sets, pulling the full text of every active creative for analysis.
Meta Investigation.impact: A complete audit of live ad copy is retrieved instantly on demand, eliminating the need to manually open and read each ad in the platform interface.

Meta Investigation.action: Claude scans all collected ad copy for specified phrases or terms, identifies every match, and records the exact field and copy snippet where each instance appears.
Meta Investigation.impact: Compliance and copy reviews that require reading through dozens of ads manually are completed in seconds with pinpoint accuracy and full traceability.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a structured flagged list to the requestor showing each phrase match with the exact ad, field, and copy where it was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: The right person receives a precise, actionable report immediately, enabling fast copy corrections or compliance action without any manual digging.

Paid Channel Chat bot.action: Pulls live performance data and ad content from active Meta and TikTok campaigns to serve as the grounded data source for the chatbot.
Paid Channel Chat bot.impact: The chatbot answers questions with real, up-to-date campaign data rather than estimates, making every response immediately actionable for the paid media team.

Paid Channel Chat bot.action: Claude interprets natural language questions about paid channel performance and responds with insights, comparisons, or recommendations drawn directly from the live ad data.
Paid Channel Chat bot.impact: Anyone on the team can get instant, plain-English answers about campaign performance without needing to build reports or navigate ad platform dashboards.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox, detects incoming applications, and extracts resume attachments and applicant details from each email.
Resume Bot.impact: Every inbound application is captured and routed automatically the moment it arrives, ensuring no candidate slips through and removing inbox management from the recruiting team's plate.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each resume PDF to a structured folder in Drive, organized by role or applicant, for centralized record-keeping.
Resume Bot.impact: All candidate files are stored in one accessible location automatically, eliminating manual filing and ensuring records are never lost in an inbox.

Resume Bot.action: Claude reads each resume and scores the candidate against the open role's requirements, then categorizes them as approved, denied, or paused based on role availability and fit.
Resume Bot.impact: Initial screening is completed in seconds per candidate, allowing the recruiting team to focus their time only on qualified applicants rather than reading every submission.

Resume Bot.action: Sends auto-reply emails to denied, no-resume, and paused candidates, and logs every applicant decision — including a Pending tab for paused-role candidates — to a Sheets dashboard.
Resume Bot.impact: Candidates receive timely, professional responses automatically while the team maintains a real-time dashboard of the full applicant pipeline with zero manual data entry.

summary: The pipeline is running strong with 56 total agents across the board — 29 completed, 10 in progress, and 17 planned. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week. On the progress front, the Paid Channel Chatbot officially moved to Completed, adding another powerful tool to our growing suite of live automation. Great work to everyone pushing these projects forward — the pipeline continues to scale and deliver real impact across the team!
